message:
fix(obligation-tracker): fail-closed capacity enforcement with terminal-only eviction

Replace silent eviction of any oldest obligation (including live Reserved
ones) with a safe two-phase capacity guard:

- Change reserve() return type from ObligationId to Result<ObligationId, String>
- Add evict_oldest_terminal_obligation(): only evicts Committed, RolledBack,
  or Leaked state obligations
- Extract mark_expired_reserved_as_leaked() from run_leak_scan() for reuse
- Add ensure_capacity_for_reserve(): tries terminal eviction first, then
  leak-scan-then-evict, then returns ERR_OBL_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED
- Add ERR_OBL_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED error code
- Reimplement run_leak_scan() via mark_expired_reserved_as_leaked()
- Update all test call sites with reserve_ok() helper wrapper
- Add tests: reserve rejects when full of live entries, reserve reclaims
  expired obligations before inserting

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
